prompt: Generate a [PRODUCT] inspired by [THING]. Rules: - do not merely decorate the product with the subject - infer DESIGN_DNA from [THING] - preserve FUNCTIONAL_CORE of [PRODUCT] - translate THING’s visual identity into the industrial design language of the product - the final object must feel like a believable premium real-world product, not a novelty prop - infer MATERIAL_SYSTEM, SIGNATURE_FEATURES, and CONTROL_LANGUAGE automatically - map PRODUCT components into THING-inspired functional forms - integrate subtle branding or symbolic cues derived from [THING] - place the product in an inferred or specified ENVIRONMENT that enhances its luxury and usability - no hard-coded materials, features, controls, logos, colors, or parts unless supplied
promptEn: Generate a [PRODUCT] inspired by [THING]. Rules: - do not merely decorate the product with the subject - infer DESIGN_DNA from [THING] - preserve FUNCTIONAL_CORE of [PRODUCT] - translate THING’s visual identity into the industrial design language of the product - the final object must feel like a believable premium real-world product, not a novelty prop - infer MATERIAL_SYSTEM, SIGNATURE_FEATURES, and CONTROL_LANGUAGE automatically - map PRODUCT components into THING-inspired functional forms - integrate subtle branding or symbolic cues derived from [THING] - place the product in an inferred or specified ENVIRONMENT that enhances its luxury and usability - no hard-coded materials, features, controls, logos, colors, or parts unless supplied
promptZh: 生成一个受 [THING] 启发的 [PRODUCT]。规则：- 不要仅仅用主题装饰产品 - 从 [THING] 中推断出 DESIGN_DNA - 保留 [PRODUCT] 的 FUNCTIONAL_CORE - 将 THING 的视觉识别转化为产品的工业设计语言 - 最终物体必须感觉像是一个可信的高端现实世界产品，而不是新奇的道具 - 自动推断 MATERIAL_SYSTEM、SIGNATURE_FEATURES 和 CONTROL_LANGUAGE - 将 PRODUCT 组件映射为受 THING 启发的函数式形态 - 整合源自 [THING] 的微妙品牌标识或符号暗示 - 将产品置于一个能增强其奢华感和可用性的推断或指定 ENVIRONMENT 中 - 除非另有提供，否则不得硬编码材质、特征、控件、徽标、颜色或部件
